Thought: The task is to search for tourist attractions in Taiwan using Google. I should type the query "tourist attractions in Taiwan" into the search bar.
Action: Type [7]; tourist attractions in Taiwan

Action: Click [38]

Action: Scroll WINDOW; down

Action: Scroll WINDOW; up
